name: @auto-ml-skills/disco
description: DisCo CLI for creating, validating, importing, exporting, and maintaining Agent Skills

scripts.build: tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && shx chmod +x dist/cli.js && npm run copy-assets
scripts.build:binary: npm --prefix ../tui run build && npm --prefix ../ai run build && npm --prefix ../agent run build && npm run build && bun build --compile ./dist/bun/cli.js ./src/utils/image-resize-worker.ts --outfile dist/disco && npm run copy-binary-assets
scripts.copy-assets: shx mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/theme && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/modes/interactive/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/modes/interactive/assets && node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),cp=require(\"child_process\"),dir=\"src/modes/interactive/assets\"; if(fs.existsSync(dir)&&fs.readdirSync(dir).some(f=>f.endsWith(\".png\"))) cp.execFileSync(\"shx\",[\"cp\",\"src/modes/interactive/assets/*.png\",\"dist/modes/interactive/assets/\"],{stdio:\"inherit\"})" && shx mkdir -p dist/core/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html src/core/export-html/template.css src/core/export-html/template.js dist/core/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/core/export-html/vendor/ && shx rm -rf dist/disco-resources && shx mkdir -p dist/disco-resources && shx cp -r src/disco/skills dist/disco-resources/ && shx mkdir -p dist/disco/dynamic-workflows && shx cp src/disco/dynamic-workflows/LICENSE dist/disco/dynamic-workflows/LICENSE
scripts.copy-binary-assets: shx cp package.json dist/ && shx cp README.md dist/ && shx cp CHANGELOG.md dist/ && shx mkdir -p dist/theme && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/assets && node -e "const fs=require(\"fs\"),cp=require(\"child_process\"),dir=\"src/modes/interactive/assets\"; if(fs.existsSync(dir)&&fs.readdirSync(dir).some(f=>f.endsWith(\".png\"))) cp.execFileSync(\"shx\",[\"cp\",\"src/modes/interactive/assets/*.png\",\"dist/assets/\"],{stdio:\"inherit\"})" && shx mkdir -p dist/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html src/core/export-html/template.css src/core/export-html/template.js dist/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/export-html/vendor/ && shx rm -rf dist/disco-skills && shx cp -r src/disco/skills dist/disco-skills && shx cp ../../node_modules/@silvia-odwyer/photon-node/photon_rs_bg.wasm dist/ && shx mkdir -p dist/disco/dynamic-workflows && shx cp src/disco/dynamic-workflows/LICENSE dist/disco/dynamic-workflows/LICENSE
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run shrinkwrap

author: Auto-ML-Skills
